summary:
Claim: Sudden severe abdominal pain after heavy alcohol use is most indicative of acute pancreatitis.  
Evidence: Alcohol directly damages pancreatic acinar cells, triggering inflammatory cascades; symptoms typically include central/epigastric pain radiating to the back.  
Answer: A
